SEARCH:
程序包 org.graphstream.stream.file

类 FileSinkDynamicGML

java.lang.Object
org.graphstream.stream.file.FileSinkBase
org.graphstream.stream.file.FileSinkGML
org.graphstream.stream.file.FileSinkDynamicGML
所有已实现的接口:
AttributeSink, ElementSink, FileSink, Sink
public class FileSinkDynamicGML extends FileSinkGML
Transform the input events into a GML graph.

THIS CLASS IS REALLY NOT APPROPRIATE FOR GENERAL USE. Indeed the GML format is not dynamic and it is very difficult to export the correct attributes of nodes if the declaration of the attribute is far from the declaration of the node. The only way would be to store the graph in a buffer and output it at once when the file is closed.

Therefore this class outputs attributes of nodes and edges only if their addition directly follows the corresponding node or edge.

    A node attribute was changed.

    A node was removed from the graph.

      graphAttributeAdded 在接口中 AttributeSink

      attribute - The attribute name.
      value - The attribute new value.

      public void edgeAdded(String sourceId, long timeId, String edgeId, String fromNodeId, String toNodeId, boolean directed)
      从接口复制的说明: ElementSink
      An edge was inserted in graph.
      指定者:
      edgeAdded 在接口中 ElementSink
      覆盖:
      edgeAdded 在类中 FileSinkGML
      参数:
      sourceId - Identifier of the graph where the edge was added.
      edgeId - Identifier of the added edge.
      fromNodeId - Identifier of the first node of the edge.
      toNodeId - Identifier of the second node of the edge.
      directed - If true, the edge is directed.

      public void graphCleared(String sourceId, long timeId)
      从接口复制的说明: ElementSink
      The whole graph was cleared. All the nodes, edges and attributes of the graph are removed.
      指定者:
      graphCleared 在接口中 ElementSink
      覆盖:
      graphCleared 在类中 FileSinkGML
      参数:
      sourceId - The graph cleared.

    • stepBegins

      public void stepBegins(String sourceId, long timeId, double step)
      从接口复制的说明: ElementSink

      Since dynamic graphs are based on discrete event modifications, the notion of step is defined to simulate elapsed time between events. So a step is a event that occurs in the graph, it does not modify it but it gives a kind of timestamp that allow the tracking of the progress of the graph over the time.

      This kind of event is useful for dynamic algorithms that listen to the dynamic graph and need to measure the time in the graph's evolution.

      指定者:
      stepBegins 在接口中 ElementSink
      覆盖:
      stepBegins 在类中 FileSinkGML
      参数:
      sourceId - Identifier of the graph where the step starts.
      timeId - A numerical value that may give a timestamp to track the evolution of the graph over the time.
